title: Why You Should STOP Using AI On Content

transcript.text: If you using AI to generate your content, there's nothing wrong with that, but you still can't skip the foundation. The foundation of knowing who it is that you're making it for. This is why so much of that content looks and feels the same because it's not directed toward [music] a specific person. But after working with a ton of creators, one of the things I see is that sometimes some of those questions that we're asking, if we don't know who it is that we're making it for, are just surface level and they don't really give us the results that we're looking for. You can ask, you know, help me find my niche or give me content ideas, but if you're not looking for content ideas for a specific type of person that is dealing with a specific type of issue, that is looking for a specific type of thing, those content ideas you get are just going to be hit or miss.
